description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical vase with a slightly rounded body and a thick, pronounced rim at the top. The surface is composed of smooth, polished stone, likely alabaster or marble, featuring natural, swirling bands of cream, beige, and light brown hues. The bands wrap diagonally around the body, giving the vase a distinctive, organic appearance. The opening is wide and circular, with a deep interior suitable for holding flowers or decorative items. There are no visible handles, carvings, or additional ornamentation, emphasizing the natural beauty of the stone. The vase appears well-preserved, with no visible chips or cracks, and would be suitable for display in refined urban settings.
description: A smooth, cylindrical stone vase with swirling cream and beige bands and a thick, rounded rim. Its polished surface and natural patterns give it an elegant, understated look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick rim and a prominent diagonal cream band across the body.
description_view_1: This side highlights a more continuous, lighter band wrapping around the vase and a slightly more pronounced curve to the body.
description_view_2: The back view displays a broader, darker band near the base and a more uniform beige coloration.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the lower dark band and the smooth transition between the cream and beige tones.
